arts.ttl: Ruthless Amorim says United’s slump has made him a more complete manager
arts.sum: ‘Sometimes you need to lose to grow,’ says manager Manchester United face Fulham in FA Cup on Sunday Ruben Amorim has said the challenges faced in his turbulent first three months in charge of Manchester United have made him a “more complete manager”. The Portuguese took over in November and has overseen five victories in 16 Premier League matches, leaving them 14th. One of those wins was at Fulham, who visit Old Trafford on Sunday in the FA Cup fifth round. The holders face a crucial week with a last-16 first leg trip to Real Sociedad in the Europa League on Thursday with redundancies off the pitch and poor performances on it. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim gives Thomas Tuchel simple advice about Harry Maguire
arts.sum: Harry Maguire has given Ruben Amorim no choice but to make him a starter at Manchester United and the Red Devils boss believes that England manager Thomas Tuchel should do the same

arts.ttl: Amorim: INEOS decisions show clear path to Man Utd success
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says INEOS's decisions are showing a "clear path" towards success at Manchester United - despite mass redundancies being announced for this year.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sends warning to Man Utd squad ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: The Manchester United manager may need to dispose of players he inherited from Erik ten Hag if he is to reshape his squad

arts.ttl: Chelsea signing confirmed as Arsenal and Man Utd need striker transfer: FT recap
arts.sum: Plus, Arsenal and Man Utd received further proof that they desperately need to sign strikers and Real Madrid outlined their plans to sign William Saliba . Chelsea signing confirmed as Arsenal and Man Utd need striker transfer: FT recap

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Fulham
arts.sum: Manchester United desperately need FA Cup success to salvage a torrid campaign and there will be huge pressure on them to reach the quarter-finals on Sunday afternoon. CB: Leny Yoro - United's central defensive trio will be tested by the powerful Raul Jimenez, who should return to the starting XI on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 15 players could miss Manchester United vs Fulham after Ruben Amorim gives injury update
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Ruben Amorim and Co. prepare to face Fulham in the fifth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Glazer family told they made their biggest Man Utd mistake 12 years ago - 'It's a joke!'
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson and David Gill both left Manchester United in the of 2013, and ex-United chief Peter Kenyon feels the failure to act then is still costing the club now

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe blasted for summer 'stupidity' which is making Man Utd even worse
arts.sum: Manchester United decided to stick with Erik ten Hag in the summer despite him being on borrowed time, and that decision has made left harder for Ruben Amorim since he was appointed

arts.ttl: Ex-Man Utd star makes 'major' Leny Yoro prediction with Arsenal and Liverpool comparison
arts.sum: Manchester United paid £52million to sign Leny Yoro from Lille last summer and after his Premier League debut was delayed due to a pre-season injury, the defender has impressed Ruben Amorim
